title: Stussy Betrays CP0
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Luffy, Kuma, Bonney, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You've turned me into a helpless child!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Give me back my Golden Years!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Calm down.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My power doesn't last forever on living things!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You said you had a reason? Well you better start talking.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why the hell did you kill my father?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: B-But Bonney!! If I tell you...

dialogue.speaker: Kuma
dialogue.text: Red Port

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Look! Kuma's trying...

dialogue.speaker: Kuma
dialogue.text: ...to climb the red line!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way he'll make it all the way to the top!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I divulged the reason... It would only serve to hurt you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's why I can't...

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: I promised Kuma...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that I would keep his secret from you no matter what!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're saying you can't tell me...

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: ...Why you had to kill my dad?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do I look like I was born yesterday?! stop screwing around!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not trying to pull a fast one here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You've gotta believe me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Nobody made the decision for him!!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Kuma chose that fate for himself!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You liar!! Dad would never choose to die and abandon me!! I'll kill you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's been hard on me too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wish I could forget the whole ordeal!!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Kuma's an incredible man!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've always been proud to call him my close friend!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bonney, please understand!! I can't say anything more on the matter!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Just spit it out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not gonna blindly swallow your half-assed excuses!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: gyah!! This is child abuse!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Beep beep beep keep

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Bonney, wait!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pay no attention to what's over there!! It's got nothing to do with Kuma, you hear!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
